mapper.insert: insert into visitor_record( ipaddr, location, browser, os, visit_time, user_agent, abnormal_flag, abnormal_type, create_by, is_deleted, create_time )values ( #{ipaddr}, #{location}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{visitTime}, #{userAgent}, #{abnormalFlag}, #{abnormalType}, #{createBy}, 0, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update visitor_record
blacklist = #{isBlacklist}, reason = #{reason},
where visitor_record_id = #{visitorRecordId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select:
select visitor_record_id, ipaddr, location, visit_time from visitor_record
and visit_time >= #{startTime} and visit_time <= #{endTime} and ipaddr like concat('%', #{ipaddr}, '%') and location like concat('%', #{location}, '%') and blacklist = #{blacklist} and is_deleted = 0

select visitor_record_id, ipaddr, location, browser, os, visit_time, user_agent, abnormal_flag, abnormal_type, reason from visitor_record where visitor_record_id = #{visitorRecordId} and is_deleted = 0
